enabled.hint: When disabled, the plugin will not process any group messages.

ignore_self_messages.hint: Recommended to avoid reply loops triggered by the bot's own messages.

group_whitelist.hint: Comma-separated group IDs. Empty means all groups.

rules_json.hint: JSON array. Each item supports name, enabled, groups, match_type(keyword/exact/regex), pattern, reply, ignore_case, continue_after_reply, cooldown_seconds, priority. Reply variables: {message} {sender_id} {sender_name} {group_id} {rule_name}. Regex also supports {match}, {g1}, or named groups.
rules_json.default:
[
  {
    "name": "ad-warning",
    "enabled": true,
    "groups": ["123456789"],
    "match_type": "keyword",
    "pattern": "代挂",
    "reply": "本群禁止发布代挂广告，请遵守群规。",
    "ignore_case": true,
    "continue_after_reply": false,
    "cooldown_seconds": 10,
    "priority": 1
  },
  {
    "name": "welcome-regex",
    "enabled": false,
    "groups": [],
    "match_type": "regex",
    "pattern": "^我是(?P<name>.+)$",
    "reply": "收到，欢迎你 {name}。",
    "ignore_case": true,
    "continue_after_reply": false,
    "cooldown_seconds": 0,
    "priority": 2
  }
]
